```{python}
org.Highchart(key = "my-highchart",
              title = "Highchart title",
              data = my_dataframe,
              xlabel = "my_xlabel")
```
```{python}
org.FactBox(key = "my-factbox,
            title = "Factbox title"
            markdown_content = f"""
                Markdown text with dynamic content: {my_number}.
            """)
```

The output of creating a component will be a help text showing how to insert it in the document.

Inserting a highchart that has data:

{{< org my-highchart >}}

Inserting a factbox that has markdown text:

{{< org my-factbox >}}

Inserting a highchart that lacks data (paste excel data in codeblock instead):

```{.org #my-highchart }
Column 1, Column 2
1, 2
3, 4
```

Inserting a factbox that lacks markdown text (write in fenced div instead):

::: {.org #my-factbox }
Markdown text with dynamic content: ```{python} my_number```.
:::
